rulings.Case Title: DERRICK R.L. CHEN ET AL VS. PROSPECT PATH LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Judgment And Summary Adjudication; Notice And Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday Aug 10, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF DERRICK CHEN, STANLEY CHEN, WAI TANG, EVENTUATE, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Plaintiffs Motion For Summary Judgment And Summary Adjudication GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. No opposition filed. Judgment shall enter jointly and severally against all defendants. = (501/REQ)
